name: Drunken Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble all ingredients.
2. Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
3. Add olive oil and sauté the chicken breasts until just done, about 2-3 minutes per side. Remove to a warm plate.
4. Deglaze the pan with tequila (if desired, you can use a flame to remove any alcohol).
5. Add garlic, scallions, and cilantro, and briefly sauté until fragrant.
6. Pour in chicken stock, heavy cream, Dijon mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Simmer the mixture for 2-3 minutes until it thickens slightly.
8. Return the chicken breasts to the skillet and simmer together for an additional 1-2 minutes.
